news_title: AgriFORCE Growing Systems (AGRI) to Launch as First Publicly-Traded Avalanche-Focused Company on NASDAQ with a $550 Million Capital Raise Strategy
summary: AgriFORCE Growing Systems (NASDAQ: AGRI)announced its transformation intoAVAX One, becoming the first NASDAQ-listed company focused on Avalanche blockchain technology. The company unveiled a$550 million capital raise strategy, aiming to accumulate over$700 million worth of AVAX tokens.Led by CEO Jolie Kahn and nominated Chairman Matt Zhang, the company's strategy includes a$300 million PIPEand plans to raise an additional$250 millionthrough equity-linked instruments. The strategic advisory board features industry leaders Anthony Scaramucci of SkyBridge Capital and Brett Tejpaul of Coinbase Institutional.The initiative is backed by over 50 institutional and crypto-native investors, including ParaFi, Galaxy Digital, and Digital Currency Group. The company aims to become the 'Berkshire Hathaway of the onchain financial economy' by focusing on asset accumulation and integrating fintech businesses onto the Avalanche network.
